column1: # ─── OWNER ROLE: CRUD on owned entities (conditions applied in YAML) ──────────
## Catalog — full access to owned entities (conditional rules in rbac-conditions.yaml)
## RBAC UI — read-only (owners can view but not manage policies)
## Scaffolder — can create tasks and read only their own
